Documentation for PULSEv2 protocols, battery state transitions, Doxygen usage, SPI flash imaging, Bluetooth stack porting, and FreeRTOS tasks.

## Folders
- **[pulse2](pulse2/README.md)**: Documentation for PULSEv2 protocols, including flash imaging, reliable transport, and historical evolution.

## Files
- **[battery_state.dot](battery_state.dot.md)**: A DOT graph representing battery state transitions for charging and discharging processes.
- **[docstring-help.md](docstring-help.md.md)**: Guidelines and tips for using Doxygen in the Pebble firmware documentation.
- **[legacy_flash_imaging.txt](legacy_flash_imaging.txt.md)**: Documentation for legacy SPI flash imaging commands using the serial console, including dump, erase, and write operations.
- **[porting-bluetooth.md](porting-bluetooth.md.md)**: Documentation for porting a new Bluetooth stack into PebbleOS, detailing build notes and API requirements.
- **[tasks.txt](tasks.txt.md)**: Documentation of FreeRTOS and Pebble-specific tasks, including their roles and interactions.
